# Deck Rules

When building a deck you cannot contain both Light Side and Dark Side cards. Only one or the other. Any deck can use Neutral Cards.

You must have at least 60 cards with the following minimums
at least 12 space units
at least 12 ground units
at least 12 character unit cards

Doesn't have more than twice as many unit cards of one type than another.
Example: You can't have only 12 space unit cars with 25 ground unit cards in a deck. 25 is more than twich as much as 12. The most you could have is 24.

Has no more than 4 copies of any card with the same name and version.
